# Elavive Physio — Spine & Knee Clinic
# Jaipur's leading physiotherapy clinic for spine and knee rehabilitation

## Clinic
Name: Elavive Physio — Spine & Knee Clinic
Location: 100, Basement Floor, Milap Nagar, Tonk Road, opposite Rajasthan Jaipuria Hospital, Kailashpuri, Jaipur, Rajasthan 302018, India
Coordinates: 27.629943, 75.715409
Phone: +91-8955032437
Email: elavivephysio@gmail.com
Hours: Monday to Saturday 9:00 AM to 8:00 PM, Sunday by prior appointment only
Google Rating: 5.0 stars, 20 reviews
Cashless / TPA facility available

## Doctor
Name: Dr. Ajay Agarwal (PT)
Title: Founder & Director, Elavive Physio Spine & Knee Clinic
Credentials: BPT, MPT(Neurology), MHA, MIAFT, MJPN, COMT, CKT(USA), CDNT, CSCIS(Hyderabad)
Experience: 4+ years, 4000+ patients treated, 40+ cities, 5+ countries
Education: BPT from JNU Institute of Medical Sciences and Research Centre; MPT(Neurology) from Janardan Rai Nagar Rajasthan Vidyapeeth (JRNRVU), Udaipur; MBA in Hospital and Healthcare Management
International: Johns Hopkins University (2 certifications), Imperial College London (3 certifications)

## Services
- Spine & Back: back pain, sciatica, slip disc, spondylitis, posture rehabilitation
- Knee & Joint: osteoarthritis, ACL/PCL injuries, meniscus tears, joint stiffness
- Shoulder: frozen shoulder, rotator cuff tears, shoulder impingement
- Sports Injury: muscle tears, tendinopathy, ligament sprains, overuse injuries
- Post-Surgical Rehabilitation: knee replacement, spinal surgery, ACL reconstruction
- Neurological Rehabilitation: stroke, spinal cord injury, Parkinson's, foot drop, FES technology
- Specialized: Dry Needling, Cupping Therapy, Hydrotherapy, IASTM, Pediatric Rehabilitation

https://www.elavivephysio.com
